headline: Semis & Tech lead on AI supercycle intact; Gold Miners in freefall on hawkish Fed; NFP Thursday & Iran Doha talks are the week's market-moving wildcards.

Healthcare (XLV) hits 52-week high on defensive rotation while semis (SMH) break down and energy (XLE) bleeds as Iran oil license deflates the war premium — June 30 Doha talks and July 2 jobs report are the binary events that reset the tape.
Micron's blowout AI memory earnings reset semis bullish while hawkish Warsh + 68% Sept hike odds crush gold miners and REITs; May PCE report today is the week's override risk.
